pred_reason: The contract uses Solidity 0.4.24 which lacks built-in integer overflow checks, corresponding to SWC-101. Multiple unsafe arithmetic operations were identified across functions, including in CappedVault.withdraw() and PresalePackThree.calculatePrice(), indicating SWC-107 violations. Evidence: Compiler version 0.4.24 lacks built-in overflow protection (Task 9); Multiple unsafe arithmetic operations identified (Task 1.1.1); Integer underflow vulnerability in calculatePrice() function (Task 4)
